lessons.title: Status Updates
lessons.description: Check in on colleagues and share news

lessons.title: Personal Info
lessons.description: Exchange phone numbers, emails, and origins

lessons.title: Objects & Location
lessons.description: Identify everyday objects and ask where things are

lessons.title: Places & Time
lessons.description: Prepositions of place, polite expressions, and days of the week

lessons.title: Months & Birthdays
lessons.description: Learn months of the year and ask about birthdays

lessons.title: Possession
lessons.description: Ask whose things are and use possessive pronouns

lessons.title: Casual Check-ins
lessons.description: Casual greetings and asking about news

lessons.title: There Is/Are
lessons.description: Use 'hay' to ask about existence of things

lessons.title: Counting Things
lessons.description: Ask how many and describe quantities in rooms

lessons.title: Household Items
lessons.description: Ask about appliances and items in specific rooms

lessons.title: Family & Well-being
lessons.description: Ask how family members are doing

lessons.title: Food & Drinks
lessons.description: Ask about beverages and food availability

lessons.title: Giving Directions
lessons.description: Tell someone to go to places and locations

lessons.title: Commands & Actions
lessons.description: Give commands like look, call, and watch

lessons.title: Negative Commands
lessons.description: Tell someone not to do something
